mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_group_open_record a inner join lkt_group_open b on a.open_id=b.id inner join lkt_product_list c on a.goods_id=c.id inner join lkt_configure attr on attr.id=a.attr_id inner join lkt_user u on u.user_id=a.user_id left join lkt_user team on team.user_id=b.user_id inner join lkt_group_activity ac on ac.id=b.activity_id

select count(1) from lkt_order a inner join lkt_order_details b on a.sno=b.r_sno and a.recycle=b.recycle inner join lkt_group_open_record `record` on `record`.sno=a.sno inner join lkt_group_open `open` on `open`.id=`record`.open_id inner join lkt_configure attr on attr.id=b.sid inner join lkt_product_list c on c.id = attr.pid left join lkt_mch mch on mch.id=c.mch_id
select count(1) from lkt_group_open_record a inner join lkt_order o on o.sno=a.sno inner join lkt_order_details b on b.r_sno=a.sno
